## Goal of today's meeting

- Make a plan for the structure of manuscript based on the current
 > analysis result.

 - Have an initial time plan. When to finish the writing?

- Clarify which should be improved in the following month.

## Agenda of the meeting

- What we have progressed with the datasets

 - TMA

 - NKI

 - Stellar

- Discussion about the manuscript

 - Show the overleaf template, to check the structure of the
 > manuscript

## Questions

- What to report from NKI dataset

 - Which level of the cell type calling do we want to achieve?

 - Goal of accuracy?

- About CyTOF dataset: More suggestions?

- Is the current structure of the manuscript okay?

 - Which parts to keep / update

 - Specific question for result part

 - Is it necessary to include benchmarking part?

 - "Besides cell type calling, Tribus also extracts common
 > useful spatial features given the X and Y coordinates..."
 > Do we still plan to include this?

## Notes 

- Anniina & Fer can help with the logic table for celltypes

- Possible abstract for AACR for October (mid-july) - Ziqi should
 > submit before June 26th (holiday)

- Abstract formulation together

- Fer's papers timeline: August (first abstract), submission: late
 > August, early September -- co-submission with Fernando's paper

- Check co-published papers: Are they using also other data than the
 > co-submitted one?

- Check how robust is Tribus (how reproducible it is)

- Highlights for writing

 - Tribus is very fast

 - Show how robust is Tribus (how reproducible it is)

 - About accuracy:

 - Correct annotation of cells is very crucial for many of the
 > spatial annotation methods.

 - Tribus is unsupervised so we can't expect a 99% accuracy...
